title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 347.035 - Organization authorized, purpose
text:
347.035.  Organization authorized, purpose. — A limited liability company may be organized under sections 347.010 to 347.187 and may conduct or promote any lawful businesses or purposes within this state or any other jurisdiction.
(L. 1993 S.B. 66 & 20 § 359.710) 
Effective 12-01-93
